name: Madharaasi (Tamil, Eng Sub)
summary: Madharasi is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language action thriller film written and directed by AR Murugadoss.

name: Baaghi 4 (Hindi, Eng Sub)
summary: At his lowest, Ronny survives a deadly train crash he never intended to live through.

name: The Naked Gun
summary: Follows the misadventures of Detective Frank Drebin's son, Frank Drebin jr.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba- Infinity Castle (Japanese, Eng Sub)
summary: The three-part cinematic movie represents the final arc and culmination of the hugely popular award-winning anime shonen series.

name: The Conjuring: Last Rites
summary: The Conjuring: Last Rites delivers another thrilling chapter of the iconic Conjuring cinematic universe, based on real events.

name: Fight or Flight
summary: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking down a target on a plane but must protect her when they're surrounded by people trying to kill both of them.

name: The Roses
summary: Ivy and Theo, the picture-perfect couple who have successful careers, great kids, and an enviable sex life. But underneath the façade of the perfect family is a tinderbox of competition and resentments.

name: Freakier Friday
summary: Anna Coleman and her mother Tess are in another predicament when they swap bodies with Anna's daughter. Now it's up to the three to reverse the body swap.

name: Caught Stealing
summary: Burned-out ex-baseball player Hank Thompson unexpectedly finds himself embroiled in a dangerous struggle for survival amidst the criminal underbelly of 1990s NYC...

name: Weapons
summary: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

name: The Fantastic Four: First Steps
summary: One of Marvel's most iconic families makes it to the big screen: the Fantastic Four.

name: F1 The Movie
summary: A Formula One driver comes out of retirement to mentor and team with a younger driver.

name: Eddington
summary: In May of 2020, a standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in Eddington, New Mexico.

name: The Toxic Avenger
summary: A horrible toxic accident transforms downtrodden janitor, Winston Gooze into a new evolution of hero: The Toxic Avenger.

name: Tabby McTat Sing-Along / Superworm
summary: Tabby McTat Sing-Along: Set in London's streets, follows a musical cat and Fred, a gifted busker, and their warm, amazing friendship. Superworm is super-long and super-strong, and is always saving the day.

name: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba- Infinity Castle (Dubbed)
summary: The three-part cinematic movie represents the final arc and culmination of the hugely popular award-winning anime shonen series.

name: Smurfs
summary: When Papa Smurf is mysteriously taken by evil wizards, Razamel and Gargamel, Smurfette leads the Smurfs on a mission into the real world to save him.

name: The Shadow's Edge (Mandarin, Eng Sub)
summary: A crew of criminal prodigies disappears with billions, evading capture by outsmarting the formidable “Sky Eye” surveillance system.

name: Light of the World
summary: Follows Jesus' life from ministry beginnings through crucifixion, resurrection, as seen through Apostle John's eyes.

name: Kangaroo Island
summary: When Lou returns home to ruggedly beautiful Kangaroo Island at the request of her father, years of family secrets resurface in this beautiful, emotionally rewarding film.

name: But Also John Clarke
summary: For over 40 years, the iconic John Clarke tickled the funny bones of Australian and New Zealand audiences. Now hear his story in his own words.

name: Primitive War
summary: Vietnam. 1968. A recon unit known as Vulture Squad is sent to an isolated jungle valley to uncover the fate of a missing Green Beret platoon.

name: Nobody 2
summary: Bob Odenkirk returns as Hutch Mansell, a seemingly ordinary suburban dad and former assassin who is once again drawn into the violent world he tried to leave behind.

name: The Ballad of Wallis Island
summary: THE BALLAD OF WALLIS ISLAND follows Charles, an eccentric lottery winner who lives alone on a remote island and dreams of getting his favorite musicians back together.

name: Lokah Chapter 1: Chandra (Malayalam, Eng Sub)
summary: Extraordinary events unfold when an aimless trio of friends encounter their new neighbour — a mysterious young woman with a haunting past. A darkly comic fantasy thriller

name: Jurassic World: Rebirth
summary: Five years after Jurassic World Dominion, an expedition braves isolated equatorial regions to extract DNA from three massive prehistoric creatures.

name: The Bengal Files (Hindi, Eng Sub)
summary: A Kashmiri Pandit CBI officer investigates a journalist’s disappearance in Bengal, haunted by his mother’s genocide.

name: Dead To Rights (Mandarin, Eng Sub)
summary: In the Nanjing Massacre of 1937, in order to save his life, postman A Chang pretended to be a photo developer in a photo studio and developed photos for the Japanese army

name: Honey Don't!
summary: Ethan Coen's new film continues his lesbian B-movie trilogy after Drive-Away Dolls, centering on two women on a road trip.

name: Jaws - 50th Anniversary
summary: A giant great white shark arrives on the shores of a New England beach resort and wreaks havoc with bloody attacks on swimmers.

name: The Bride (Thai &  Vietnamese )
summary: Young Vietnamese woman engaged to wealthy Thai man. Visiting his rural hometown, she tries on heirloom wedding dress, encountering ghostly bride presence.

name: Ghaati (Telugu, Eng Sub)
summary: Follows the story of an empowered woman who gets entangled with weed trade due to circumstances.

name: Mr Burton
summary: Set against the grit of post-war Wales, MR BURTON is the extraordinary true story of a working-class boy destined for greatness and the teacher who saw it first.

name: Relay
summary: A broker of lucrative payoffs between corrupt corporations and the individuals who threaten them breaks his own rules when a new client seeks his protection to stay alive.
